package.name: mserve_display
package.description: Drives the ELEGOO 3.5" SPI touchscreen (ILI9486 + ADS7846 resistive touch) directly via /dev/fb0 and evdev — a plain rclcpp::Node, not lifecycle-managed (no hardware "connect" step worth gating, same as robot_state_publisher). Shows a default face screen with eyes that track /mserve/cmd_vel_safe's steering direction, and a menu (Connect / Info / Face) for opening the drivechain's UART and viewing IP/drive status. Framebuffer and touch input access is plain Linux syscalls (mmap/ioctl/evdev) — no graphics library dependency.
